contractsRenewalsDesc: Open items across contracts, renewals, HR docs, permits, and SLAs.
nothingOpenGood: Nothing open in these queues — good.
accountsNeedingAttentionDesc: Same order as your resolution queue below. Each row: what's wrong, who it's for, what to do next.
noAccountsNeedAction: No accounts need action in CRM right now.
cashAtRiskDesc: Overdue PRO billing and unpaid subscriptions — open collections to chase.
approvalsWaitingDesc: Queues across HR, finance, and contracts — tap a row to decide.
noPendingApprovals: No pending approvals in tracked queues.
noCompanyLinked: You’re not in a company workspace yet
noCompanyLinkedDesc: Create a workspace or join with an invite to unlock SmartPRO business tools.
gettingStarted: Getting started — set up your business
managementCadenceDesc: Cadence windows reuse paid cash from the executive revenue snapshot (today / week-to-date Mon–Sun / month-to-date). Receivables, decisions, and risk figures are point-in-time as of this request, not period-allocated.
